items.briefing:
A newly discovered flaw in Windows 11's sandbox feature could allow attackers to break out of the isolated environment with a single click, potentially affecting many Australian workplaces running Windows 11. If your organisation uses Windows 11, ensure systems are kept up to date and apply any Microsoft patches promptly. Separately, a report warns that weaknesses in operational technology — the systems controlling physical infrastructure like utilities and facilities — could disrupt Australia's critical digital infrastructure if left unaddressed.

A recent study also found Australians are increasingly turning to AI tools, even as trust in them remains mixed. Be cautious about what information you share with AI platforms, particularly sensitive work or personal data.

**Tip:** Never enter confidential business information, client details, or passwords into public AI chat tools.

featured.title: OT Lapses Could Disrupt Australia's Digital Infrastructure
featured.quote: Australia's critical infrastructure vulnerable as data centre expansion outpaces security protocols.
